metadata.title: Far Horizon International Logistics Consulting
metadata.description: Professional international logistics and supply chain consulting services for global business operations

hero.title: Global Logistics, Smart Navigation
hero.subtitle: Two decades deep in international logistics consulting, delivering end-to-end supply chain solutions for businesses going global

about.title: About Far Horizon
about.description: Far Horizon International Logistics Consulting is a professional advisory firm specializing in cross-border supply chain optimization, with offices in Shanghai, Hong Kong, and Singapore. Leveraging deep industry expertise and a global perspective, we help businesses achieve logistics cost optimization and operational efficiency in a complex and ever-changing international trade environment.
about.mission: Empower every globalizing enterprise with world-class logistics competitiveness
about.vision: To become the most trusted international logistics consulting brand in Asia Pacific
about.value_professional_desc: Senior consultant team with two decades of industry experience
about.value_global_desc: Localized service network covering all major trade regions worldwide
about.value_innovation_desc: Continuously driving supply chain transformation through digital technology
about.value_trust_desc: Putting client interests first, building long-term partnerships

why_us.title: Why Choose Us
why_us.description: Two decades of excellence, delivering success through professionalism and trust

services.title: Core Services
services.description: Full-spectrum logistics and supply chain consulting services, from strategic planning to execution
services.supply_chain_desc: End-to-end supply chain diagnosis and restructuring, including network optimization, inventory strategy development, and procurement process reengineering to find the optimal balance between cost and efficiency.
services.freight_desc: Ocean, air, rail, and multimodal transport solution design with carrier management, data-driven route planning, and rate negotiation strategies.
services.customs_desc: Import/export customs compliance audits, HS code classification, rules of origin application, and FTA preferential tariff utilization strategies to reduce compliance risk and save duty costs.
services.warehouse_desc: Warehouse site selection and layout optimization, WMS system selection and implementation, last-mile delivery solution design, and cross-border warehousing strategy planning.
services.trade_desc: Export control and sanctions screening, AEO certification guidance, trade compliance management system setup, and cross-border data flow compliance assessment.
services.digital_desc: Logistics IT strategic planning, TMS/WMS system integration, supply chain visibility platform development, and AI-driven forecasting and decision support systems.
services.risk_desc: Supply chain resilience assessment, geopolitical risk analysis, contingency planning and drills, and supplier risk tiering management.
services.sustainability_desc: Carbon emission accounting and reduction roadmap planning, green transportation design, sustainable supply chain certification consulting, and ESG reporting support.

cases.title: Case Studies
cases.description: Proven consulting value through real-world success stories
cases.case1_title: Asia-Pacific Supply Chain Restructuring for a Consumer Electronics Company
cases.case1_desc: Consolidated the client's Asia-Pacific warehousing network from 7 locations to 3 regional hubs, improving inventory turnover by 40% and reducing annual logistics costs by 25%.
cases.case2_title: Customs Compliance System for an Automotive Parts Manufacturer
cases.case2_desc: Guided the client through AEO Advanced Certification, reducing customs inspection rate from 8% to 0.5%, shortening clearance time by 60%, and saving approximately $3 million in annual duty costs.
cases.case3_title: Multimodal Transport Optimization for a Cross-border E-commerce Company
cases.case3_desc: Combined China-Europe Railway Express with ocean freight scheduling, reducing average transit time from 35 days to 18 days and cutting per-container transport costs by 22%.

news.title: Industry Insights
news.description: Stay informed with the latest global logistics trends and analysis
news.item1_desc: Container freight rates are expected to remain stable in Q3 2026, though geopolitical tensions and Red Sea disruptions continue to introduce supply chain uncertainty. We help clients develop data-driven rate forecasts and contract strategies.
news.item2_title: Cross-border E-commerce Logistics Regulations Deep Dive
news.item2_desc: New customs regulations for cross-border e-commerce retail exports raise the bar on declaration processes, shipment tracking, and return compliance. Regulatory compliance is becoming a core competitive advantage for globalizing enterprises.
news.item3_title: CBAM Impact Assessment on EU-bound Logistics
news.item3_desc: As the CBAM transition period concludes, exporters to the EU must systematically assess product carbon footprints and optimize transport routes and modal combinations to prepare for the upcoming carbon border tariffs.
